member.summary: Marker interface to represent a query.

member.name: T:ChromaControl.App.Core.Services.ServiceMonitor
member.summary: A that monitors the lighting service.

member.name: M:ChromaControl.App.Core.Services.ServiceMonitor.LogServiceExecutableNotFound(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Logs "Unable to find the lighting service executable." at "Warning" level.

member.name: M:ChromaControl.App.Core.Services.ServiceMonitor.LogServiceRestartScheduled(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Double)
member.summary: Logs "Lighting service exited. Attempting restart in {DelaySeconds} seconds." at "Information" level.

member.name: M:ChromaControl.App.Core.Services.ServiceMonitor.LogServiceRestartThresholdExceeded(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Logs "Lighting service restart threshold exceeded. Maximum {MaxRestarts} restarts in {WindowSeconds} seconds." at "Error" level.

member.name: M:ChromaControl.App.Core.Services.ServiceMonitor.LogServiceStarting(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Starting lighting service from path {ServicePath}." at "Information" level.

member.name: M:ChromaControl.App.Core.Services.ServiceMonitor.LogServiceStartFailed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs "Failed to start or monitor the lighting service." at "Error" level.

member.name: M:ChromaControl.App.Core.Services.ServiceMonitor.LogServiceProcessPathMismatch(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Found existing service process '{ProcessPath}' that does not match expected executable path '{ExpectedPath}'. Ignoring." at "Warning" level.
